featured.name: Parthenon Diner Restaurant
featured.description: A landmark Greek-American diner on the Boston Post Road serving breakfast all day, classic diner fare, and Greek specialties. A familiar stop on the shoreline.

restaurants.name: AJ Noodle Bar
restaurants.description: Asian noodle shop in Old Saybrook serving a variety of noodle soups, stir-fried dishes, and other Asian specialties.

restaurants.name: Alforno Trattoria
restaurants.description: Wood-fired Italian restaurant known for its rustic trattoria-style dishes and handmade pastas. A go-to for authentic Italian dining on Old Saybrook's west end.

restaurants.name: Ashlawn Farm Coffee
restaurants.description: Farm-roasted coffee from their own local farm, offering a unique bean-to-cup cafe experience. A favorite morning stop for specialty coffee lovers.

restaurants.name: Aspen Restaurant
restaurants.description: American restaurant in Old Saybrook offering a broad menu of comfort food and classic American dishes.

restaurants.name: Ben & Jerry's
restaurants.description: The beloved Vermont ice cream chain serving scoops, sundaes, shakes, and frozen treats on Main Street.

restaurants.name: Burger King
restaurants.description: National fast food chain serving flame-grilled burgers, fries, and classic drive-through fare.

restaurants.name: Cafe Toscana
restaurants.description: Tuscan-inspired cafe serving breakfast, lunch, and baked goods with Italian flair in Old Saybrook's Main Street area.

restaurants.name: Comfort Cafe
restaurants.description: A cozy cafe serving breakfast and lunch comfort food in a relaxed, welcoming setting.

restaurants.name: Courtyard Restaurant
restaurants.description: American restaurant offering a casual dining experience with a varied menu of classic favorites.

restaurants.name: Cuckoo's Nest
restaurants.description: Mexican restaurant on Old Saybrook's west side, serving tacos, burritos, enchiladas, and other south-of-the-border favorites.

restaurants.name: Curry Queen
restaurants.description: Indian restaurant bringing curries, tandoori dishes, and other Indian specialties to Old Saybrook's dining scene.

restaurants.name: Dagmar's Desserts
restaurants.description: Dedicated dessert shop crafting pastries, cakes, and sweet treats. A Main Street destination for anyone with a sweet tooth.

restaurants.name: Dairy Queen
restaurants.description: National chain serving soft-serve ice cream, Blizzards, and fast food classics on the Boston Post Road.

restaurants.name: Duby's Bagels & Bakery
restaurants.description: Local bagel shop and bakery offering fresh-baked bagels, breakfast sandwiches, and baked goods.

restaurants.name: Dunkin'
restaurants.description: Popular chain serving coffee, donuts, and breakfast sandwiches on the Boston Post Road corridor.

restaurants.name: Farm Table
restaurants.description: American restaurant emphasizing farm-fresh ingredients and seasonal cooking on Old Saybrook's west side.

restaurants.name: Fenwick Ice Cream
restaurants.description: Local ice cream shop serving scoops, sundaes, and frozen treats — a perfect seasonal stop near the shore.

restaurants.name: Fiore Pizzeria
restaurants.description: Neighborhood pizzeria offering hand-tossed pies, slices, and Italian staples in Old Saybrook.

restaurants.name: Five Guys
restaurants.description: Fast-casual burger chain known for its hand-formed burgers, fresh-cut fries, and customizable toppings.

restaurants.name: Fresh Salt
restaurants.description: Upscale American restaurant at Saybrook Point Resort, offering fine dining where the Connecticut River meets Long Island Sound. Known for stunning water views and refined seasonal cuisine.

restaurants.name: Himalaya Cafe
restaurants.description: Indian restaurant on the Boston Post Road serving curries, naan, and Himalayan-inspired dishes in a casual setting.

restaurants.name: Jack Rabbits
restaurants.description: American restaurant on Main Street serving a casual menu of pub-style eats and drinks.

restaurants.name: Johnny Ad's
restaurants.description: A beloved seasonal seafood shack that's been a shoreline institution for decades, known for fried clams, lobster rolls, and outdoor picnic-table dining.

restaurants.name: La Marea
restaurants.description: Upscale Italian restaurant offering refined Italian cuisine in an elegant setting. One of Old Saybrook's special-occasion dining destinations.

restaurants.name: Little Pub Old Saybrook
restaurants.description: Casual American pub on the Boston Post Road offering a playful, varied menu with something for everyone in a laid-back atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Liv's Oyster Bar
restaurants.description: Upscale raw bar and seafood restaurant that anchors Old Saybrook's Main Street dining scene. A regional destination for oysters, fresh seafood, and craft cocktails.

restaurants.name: Liv's Shack
restaurants.description: Casual waterfront seafood spot near the marina, serving lobster rolls, fried fish, and laid-back shoreline fare from the same team behind Liv's Oyster Bar.

restaurants.name: Luigi's Restaurant
restaurants.description: Classic Italian-American restaurant on the Boston Post Road serving traditional pasta dishes, chicken parm, and old-school Italian comfort food.

restaurants.name: McDonald's
restaurants.description: National fast food chain serving burgers, chicken, breakfast items, and drive-through convenience on the Post Road.

restaurants.name: Mirsina's Restaurant
restaurants.description: Greek restaurant on Main Street offering traditional Hellenic dishes and Mediterranean flavors.

restaurants.name: Monkey Farm Cafe
restaurants.description: A breakfast and brunch institution on Main Street, popular for hearty morning meals and a lively, casual vibe.

restaurants.name: Myrcene Ale Company
restaurants.description: Old Saybrook's craft brewery, offering locally brewed beers and a taproom experience for beer enthusiasts.

restaurants.name: Mystic Market Kitchen & Eatery
restaurants.description: Prepared foods market and eatery offering fresh salads, sandwiches, entrees, and grab-and-go meals.

restaurants.name: Nori
restaurants.description: Japanese restaurant serving sushi, sashimi, and Japanese specialties in Old Saybrook.

restaurants.name: Otter Cove Restaurant & Bar
restaurants.description: Waterfront seafood restaurant and bar near the shore, offering views and a menu of fresh catches and American fare.

restaurants.name: Paperback Cafe
restaurants.description: A charming cafe inside the bookshop on Main Street, perfect for coffee, light bites, and browsing books — a unique Old Saybrook experience.

restaurants.name: Parthenon Diner Restaurant
restaurants.description: A landmark Greek-American diner on the Boston Post Road serving breakfast all day, classic diner fare, and Greek specialties. A familiar stop on the shoreline.

restaurants.name: Pasta Vita
restaurants.description: Italian restaurant focused on fresh pasta dishes, offering a straightforward menu of well-prepared Italian favorites.

restaurants.name: Peek-a-Brew Play Cafe
restaurants.description: A family-friendly cafe combining coffee and snacks with a play space for kids — a unique concept on Main Street.

restaurants.name: Penny Lane Pub
restaurants.description: Casual pub on Main Street with a British-themed atmosphere, offering pub grub and drinks in a relaxed setting.

restaurants.name: Pizza Palace
restaurants.description: Neighborhood pizza shop on the Boston Post Road serving pies, grinders, and Italian-American staples.

restaurants.name: Pizza Works
restaurants.description: Local pizzeria offering hand-crafted pies, calzones, and Italian specialties in Old Saybrook.

restaurants.name: Rabbit Hole Tavern
restaurants.description: Casual American tavern on Main Street serving comfort food and drinks in a cozy bar atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Rosemary & Sage
restaurants.description: French-inspired restaurant on the Boston Post Road bringing bistro-style cuisine to Old Saybrook. A refined dining option with Continental flair.

restaurants.name: Saigon City
restaurants.description: Vietnamese restaurant on the Boston Post Road serving pho, noodle dishes, and other Vietnamese specialties.

restaurants.name: Sal's Pizza & Pasta
restaurants.description: Pizza and pasta shop on Old Saybrook's west end offering classic pies, pasta dishes, and Italian-American favorites.

restaurants.name: Saybrook Pizza
restaurants.description: Local pizza shop serving traditional New Haven-style pies, grinders, and Italian favorites.

restaurants.name: Shakahari
restaurants.description: Vegetarian restaurant offering plant-based dining — a growing niche on the Connecticut shoreline and a welcome option for vegetarian and vegan diners.

restaurants.name: Sip Espresso & Wine Bar
restaurants.description: A dual-concept spot on Main Street that transitions from morning espresso bar to evening wine bar, offering coffee, wine, and light fare throughout the day.

restaurants.name: Skippers Seafood
restaurants.description: Seafood restaurant in Old Saybrook serving fresh catches, fried seafood baskets, and classic New England shore fare.

restaurants.name: Starbucks
restaurants.description: Global coffee chain serving espresso drinks, frappuccinos, and pastries on Main Street.

restaurants.name: Subway
restaurants.description: National sandwich chain offering made-to-order subs, wraps, and salads.

restaurants.name: Sweet Luna's
restaurants.description: Dessert shop on Main Street specializing in sweet treats, pastries, and confections.

restaurants.name: Swell
restaurants.description: Health-conscious cafe serving fresh, wholesome fare with a focus on quality ingredients and feel-good food.

restaurants.name: Tea Kettle Restaurant
restaurants.description: American restaurant on the Boston Post Road offering a casual menu of comfort food and home-style cooking.

restaurants.name: The Essex
restaurants.description: American restaurant offering upscale-casual dining with a varied menu of classic American dishes.

restaurants.name: TJ's Restaurant
restaurants.description: Pizza restaurant serving pies, pasta, and Italian-American fare — a local go-to for casual family dining.

restaurants.name: Wayback Burgers
restaurants.description: Fast-casual burger chain serving hand-dipped milkshakes and made-to-order burgers on Old Saybrook's west side.

restaurants.name: Zhang's Restaurant
restaurants.description: Chinese and Asian restaurant offering a full menu of traditional Chinese dishes, stir-fries, and Asian specialties.
